name: @serlo/remotion
description: Remotion video compositions for Serlo — App Store previews, weekly stats, live intros

scripts.render:gifters: npx remotion render src/index.ts WeeklyTopGifters out/weekly-top-gifters.mp4
scripts.render:preview: npx remotion render src/index.ts AppStorePreview out/app-store-preview.mp4
scripts.render:intro: npx remotion render src/index.ts LiveStreamIntro out/live-stream-intro.webm
scripts.render:all: npm run render:gifters && npm run render:preview && npm run render:intro
